ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dungeons" (
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dungeon */,
  "dungeon_name" TEXT /* Name of the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_map" TEXT /* File path to the dungeon map */,
  "min_level" INTEGER /* Minimum player level required to enter the dungeon */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum player level allowed to enter the dungeon */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the dungeon (e.g., Normal, Heroic) */,
  "dungeon_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards (e.g., items, gold) players can earn for completing the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the dungeon given by players */,
  "dungeon_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given by players */,
  "dungeon_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the dungeon based on player activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dungeon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dungeon was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dungeon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., World, EU, NA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region (e.g., EU, NA) */,
  "region_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region (e.g., Europe/London) */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Number of active players in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realms" (
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the realm belongs to */,
  "realm_name" TEXT /* Name of the realm (e.g., Thunderlord, Draenor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the realm */,
  "realm_type" TEXT /* Type of the realm (e.g., PvP, PvE) */,
  "realm_population" INTEGER /* Number of active players in the realm */,
  "realm_activity_score" INTEGER /* Activity score of the realm based on player activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the player */,
  "player_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who owns the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., Warrior, Mage) */,
  "character_race" TEXT /* Race of the character (e.g., Human, Orc) */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_faction" TEXT /* Faction of the character (e.g., Alliance, Horde) */,
  "character_gear_score" INTEGER /* Gear score of the character */,
  "character_achievements_count" INTEGER /* Number of achievements earned by the character */,
  "character_last_played" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the character was played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character who completed the run */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dungeon where the run was completed */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the run (e.g., 22m 0s) */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the run was completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the run */,
  "run_type" TEXT /* Type of the run (e.g., solo, group) */,
  "run_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the group (e.g., classes, roles) */,
  "run_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the run (e.g., Normal, Heroic) */,
  "run_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player for the run */,
  "run_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES player_characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dungeon */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the realm */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the run in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., global, regional, realm) */,
  "leaderboard_category" TEXT /* Category of the leaderboard (e.g., time, score) */,
  "leaderboard_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the leaderboard entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_realm_id FOREIGN KEY ("realm_id") REFERENCES realms ("realm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the achievement */,
  "achievement_icon" TEXT /* File path to the icon of the achievement */,
  "achievement_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for earning the achievement */,
  "achievement_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the achievement (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the achievement */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_status" TEXT /* Status of the achievement (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  "achievement_progress" TEXT /* Progress towards the achievement (e.g., 5/10) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player achievement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dungeon_tips" (
  "tip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tip */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dungeon */,
  "tip_description" TEXT /* Detailed tip or trick for the dungeon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the tip */,
  "tip_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the tip has received */,
  "tip_status" TEXT /* Status of the tip (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tip was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tip was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_tips_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_tips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions_count" INTEGER /* Number of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "role_activity_score" INTEGER /* Activity score of the role based on user activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_leaderboard, edit_content) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Group to which the permission belongs (e.g., content, user) */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
